channel.title: About on Vitoria Lima
channel.description: Recent content in About on Vitoria Lima

item.title: My First Post
item.description: Here I will try to start a new habit of posting ML notes and/or thoughts of papers I will be reading or revising. Most of the time I just read things and don’t keep track of them, so from here I am trying to develop this new good habit.

item.title: About
item.description: Welcome! This is my professional website. I am a master’s graduate of SEAS at Harvard University. Let’s get in touch! I’m best reached through my email, vitoria[at]vitorialima[dot]com. Academia In the time of my master’s, I completed my master thesis and was a research fellow at the Microrobotics Lab, advised by Prof. Robert Wood and Prof. Daniel Bruder, where I worked towards reducing the time needed to train reinforcement learning algorithms for soft robotic arms.

item.title: Books
item.description: I love reading. However, because of striving for a high GPA during my time in academia I never allowed myself to give myself time for pleasure reading. These are the books I am trying to read at the moment. 2023 Currently Reading Born a Crime, Trevor Noah Becoming, Michelle Obama The Light We Carry, Michelle Obama

item.title: Curriculum complexity
item.description: My master’s thesis is available upon request.
